ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "student_image" TEXT /* Student image */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Medical conditions of the student */,
  "special_needs" TEXT /* Special needs of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the school */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the school is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the school is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the school */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the school */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the principal */,
  "principal_email" TEXT /* Email address of the principal */,
  "school_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the school */,
  "graduation_year" INTEGER /* Expected graduation year of the student */,
  "current_grade_level" TEXT /* Current grade level of the student */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the grade was recorded */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the grade (e.g., reading, maths) */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score obtained by the student */,
  "term" TEXT /* Term (e.g., semester 1, semester 2) */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher who recorded the grade */,
  "grade_letter" TEXT /* Grade letter (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment for the grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teachers" (
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher */,
  "teacher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the teacher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the teacher */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the teacher */,
  "subject_specialization" TEXT /* Subject the teacher specializes in */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school where the teacher works */,
  "teacher_image" TEXT /* Teacher image */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Teacher bio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teachers_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parents" (
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parent */,
  "parent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the parent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the parent */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the parent */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship with the student (e.g., mother, father, guardian) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parents_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the attendance record */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the student (e.g., present, absent, late) */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "absence_reason" TEXT /* Reason for absence */,
  "note" TEXT /* Additional note for the attendance record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "behavior_records" (
  "behavior_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each behavior record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the behavior incident */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of incident (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "incident_status" TEXT /* Status of the incident (e.g., resolved, pending) */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken for the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("behavior_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_behavior_records_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_behavior_records_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the course */,
  "grade_level" TEXT /* Grade level of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_enrollments" (
  "course_enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade obtained by the student in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, teacher, parent) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the user is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, logout, view grades) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communications" (
  "communication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sender */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipient */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message sent */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the communication */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the communication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
